content:
I'm posting these on behalf of Cihan Okay:

Open positions in the Bilkent Quantum & Topology Group (BilQCT) at Bilkent University (deadline May 15):

  • Postdoctoral position — research on the mathematics of quantum advantage, at the interface of quantum computing, polyhedral geometry, optimization, and topology: https://www.mathjobs.org/jobs/list/28142
  • Research Software Engineer — scientific software development for quantum simulation and benchmarking; strong programming background in scientific computing preferred, prior quantum background not required: https://www.mathjobs.org/jobs/list/27278
